name: sliding-window-pipeline
description: Replace batch-and-wait with JoinSet sliding window. Per-task overhead dominated.

name: remove-chunk-flush
description: Remove per-chunk flush() on receiver. Hypothesis: fsync overhead. Result: no measurable difference on macOS.

name: larger-quic-windows
description: Increase QUIC receive/send/stream windows (256MB/256MB/32MB). No impact on localhost (50us RTT makes window updates free).
